Class AddressInputHelper

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.util.AddressInputHelper
public final class AddressInputHelper extends Object
Editable ComboBox helper with type to filter over a master address list. Saving stays in create update and place order handlers.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    clearAddressField(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo)
    Clears selection and editor text while resetting the visible filter.
    static void
    configureEditableAddressCombo(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo)
    Configures an editable address ComboBox with filtering and safe keyboard behavior.
    static String
    formatAddress(AddressOption option)
    Formats one address option into the display string used by the combo.
    static String
    getTypedText(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo)
    Returns the current trimmed editor text for free-typed addresses.
    static void
    runWithSuppress(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo, Runnable action)
    Runs an action while suppressing reactive filter updates.
    static void
    selectAddressById(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo, int addressId)
    Select by id from the full master list (not the current filter).
    static void
    setAddressItems(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo, List<AddressOption> addresses)
    Replaces the master address list used by the combo filter.

  • Method Details

    • configureEditableAddressCombo

      public static void configureEditableAddressCombo(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo)
      Configures an editable address ComboBox with filtering and safe keyboard behavior.

    • setAddressItems

      public static void setAddressItems(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo, List<AddressOption> addresses)
      Replaces the master address list used by the combo filter.

    • getTypedText

      public static String getTypedText(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo)
      Returns the current trimmed editor text for free-typed addresses.

    • formatAddress

      public static String formatAddress(AddressOption option)
      Formats one address option into the display string used by the combo.

    • runWithSuppress

      public static void runWithSuppress(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo, Runnable action)
      Runs an action while suppressing reactive filter updates.

    • selectAddressById

      public static void selectAddressById(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo, int addressId)
      Select by id from the full master list (not the current filter). Resets filter so the row is visible.

    • clearAddressField

      public static void clearAddressField(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<AddressOption> combo)
      Clears selection and editor text while resetting the visible filter.
